properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have heard of a land on the far away strand, ‘Tis a beautiful home of the soul; Built by Jesus on high, there we never shall die, ‘Tis a land where we never grow old.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Never grow old, never grow old, In a land where we’ll never grow old; Never grow old, never grow old, In a land where we’ll never grow old.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In that beautiful home where we’ll nevermore roam, We shall be in the sweet by and by; Happy praise to the King, through eternity sing, ‘Tis a land where we never shall die.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When our work here is done and the life-crown is won. And our troubles and trials are o’er, All our sorrow will end, and our voices will blend, With the loved ones who’ve gone on before.
